name: Vertical Data Inc.
summary: Vertical Data Inc. is an early development-stage technology distributor formed in 2024, providing high-performance computer solutions to enterprise and data center clients. The company distributes GPU servers, storage solutions, networking equipment, software, and system components from OEM suppliers and next-generation technology providers. It also coordinates data center and hosting services while conducting R&D to develop proprietary hardware and software for AI computing workloads including LLM training and inference.

products.name: GPU Servers
products.description: Bare metal and pre-configured servers for LLM training and inference workloads.

products.name: Storage Solutions
products.description: Storage systems distributed to enterprise and data center customers.

products.name: Networking and Communications Equipment
products.description: Networking gear distributed as part of comprehensive IT solutions.

products.name: Software
products.description: Software products distributed from OEM and next-generation technology suppliers.

products.name: Converged and Hyper-Converged Infrastructure
products.description: Next-generation delivery model infrastructure solutions for enterprise customers.

products.name: Data Center and Hosting Services
products.description: Coordination and provision of data center and hosting services for customers.

products.name: Professional Services
products.description: Services to help customers identify, prioritize, and implement AI computing opportunities.
